title: The metabolomics of psoriatic disease.
author: Yan D Afifi L Jeon C Trivedi M Chang HW Lee K Liao W
content: S-EPMC5562362 PMC5562362 The metabolomics of psoriatic disease. Metabolomics is an emerging new "omics" field involving the systematic analysis of the metabolites in a biologic system. These metabolites provide a molecular snapshot of cellular activity and are thus important for understanding
